summary: Failed (timeout): The test is finding the "4" text, but the click is being blocked by a sibling/parent div with classes like "gradient-border hover-lift fade-in step-glow" that intercepts pointer events. This suggests a front-end layering/z-index/pointer-events issue or an animation overlay that covers the target during or after render. On the hosting side, the deployed build likely has a CSS/DOM overlap bug where a decorative or loading overlay remains above the intended clickable element, cau…
